channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: 'Stay Alive,' about daily life in Nazi Berlin, shows how easy it is to just go along
item.description: Historian Ian Buruma chronicles the lives of ordinary Berliners — including his own father — during World War II. Stay Alive is about the past, but has powerful lessons for the present.
item.content:encoded: Historian Ian Buruma chronicles the lives of ordinary Berliners — including his own father — during World War II. Stay Alive is about the past, but has powerful lessons for the present.
item.dc:creator: John Powers

item.title: Trump makes case for Iran war. And, SCOTUS leans toward upholding birthright citizenship
item.description: President Trump addressed the nation last night, making his case for war with Iran. And, the Supreme Court majority seemed inclined to rule against the Trump administration on birthright citizenship.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump addressed the nation last night, making his case for war with Iran. And, the Supreme Court majority seemed inclined to rule against the Trump administration on birthright citizenship.

(Image credit: Pool)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Iran continues strikes across the Persian Gulf despite Trump's warning
item.description: Iran continued to target Gulf countries with ballistic missiles and drones Thursday as the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad issued a security alert warning of attacks by Iran-backed militias.
item.content:encoded:
Iran continued to target Gulf countries with ballistic missiles and drones Thursday as the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad issued a security alert warning of attacks by Iran-backed militias.

(Image credit: AFP via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: As hoops betting spikes, it's New Hampshire and other states vs. prediction markets
item.description: In New Hampshire and states with legalized sports gambling, wagering helps fund government services. But now competitors like Kalshi and Polymarket are getting a cut of the action.
item.content:encoded:
In New Hampshire and states with legalized sports gambling, wagering helps fund government services. But now competitors like Kalshi and Polymarket are getting a cut of the action.

(Image credit: Zoey Knox)
item.dc:creator: Todd Bookman

item.title: Have Trump's tariffs worked? This is where things stand a year after 'Liberation Day'
item.description: It has been a year since President Trump announced double-digit tariffs on imports from around the world. So far, those levies have not produced the economic boom the president promised.
item.content:encoded:
It has been a year since President Trump announced double-digit tariffs on imports from around the world. So far, those levies have not produced the economic boom the president promised.

(Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley

item.title: In a thunderous launch, Artemis II astronauts leave Earth. Here's what's next
item.description: NASA's Artemis II crew has successfully launched on a mission that will take it around the moon and back to Earth. Here's what to expect over their roughly 10-day journey.
item.content:encoded:
NASA's Artemis II crew has successfully launched on a mission that will take it around the moon and back to Earth. Here's what to expect over their roughly 10-day journey.

(Image credit: Bill Ingalls)
item.dc:creator: Brendan Byrne

item.title: Trump's VA killed a home loan program. Vets are now losing their homes because of it
item.description: Foreclosures on VA loans are at their highest level in a decade. VA has a fix but it is months away and could still leave vets worse off than most other homeowners.
item.content:encoded:
Foreclosures on VA loans are at their highest level in a decade. VA has a fix but it is months away and could still leave vets worse off than most other homeowners.

(Image credit: Margaret Albaugh for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Chris Arnold

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump says war in Iran is 'nearing completion' in national address, Iranian officials react to President Trump's speech on Iran war, SCOTUS hears arguments on birthright citizenship.
item.content:encoded: Trump says war in Iran is 'nearing completion' in national address, Iranian officials react to President Trump's speech on Iran war, SCOTUS hears arguments on birthright citizenship.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Pakistan is playing intermediary in the Iran war, a role it has played before
item.description: Pakistan has emerged as a key intermediary in the U.S-Israel war with Iran. It played this role before, during a high-stakes moment in diplomatic history.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has emerged as a key intermediary in the U.S-Israel war with Iran. It played this role before, during a high-stakes moment in diplomatic history.
item.dc:creator: Betsy Joles

item.title: U.S. lifts sanctions on Venezuela's acting President Delcy Rodríguez
item.description: The newly announced sanctions relief is the latest U.S. recognition of Rodríguez as a legitimate authority in Venezuela ever since the U.S. military captured her predecessor, Nicolás Maduro.
item.content:encoded:
The newly announced sanctions relief is the latest U.S. recognition of Rodríguez as a legitimate authority in Venezuela ever since the U.S. military captured her predecessor, Nicolás Maduro.

(Image credit: Ariana Cubillos)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
